# Google Engineer on His Sentient AI Claim

[![Image 7](https://yt3.ggpht.com/12DXqfZQBwvHFBp31Teww9briF_9d45RTmGp6fiYScdvI4LZ3xPEfmw54EXV4o6tQMuG1I2t4Q=s48-c-k-c0x00ffffff-no-rj)](https://www.youtube.com/@BloombergTechnology)

[Bloomberg Technology](https://www.youtube.com/@BloombergTechnology)

 Bloomberg Technology 

720K subscribers

3.8M views 3 years ago[#bots](https://www.youtube.com/hashtag/bots)[#artificialintelligence](https://www.youtube.com/hashtag/artificialintelligence)[#technology](https://www.youtube.com/hashtag/technology)

 3,859,264 views • Jun 23, 2022 • #bots #artificialintelligence #technology 

Google Engineer Blake Lemoine joins Emily Chang to talk about some of the experiments he conducted that lead him to think that LaMDA was a sentient AI, and to explain why he is now on administrative leave. He's on "Bloomberg Technology." [#google](https://www.youtube.com/hashtag/google)[#bots](https://www.youtube.com/hashtag/bots)[#artificialintelligence](https://www.youtube.com/hashtag/artificialintelligence)[#technology](https://www.youtube.com/hashtag/technology)…...more 

...more

And this is the first interview I've seen in a long time where the interviewer actually focused on the topic and asked insightful questions, interjected for important clarifications, and still remained unbiased. GG Emily Chang

## In this video

Transcript

![Image 33](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kgCUn4fQTsc)

## Description

Google Engineer on His Sentient AI Claim

67K Likes

3,859,264 Views

2022 Jun 23

Google Engineer Blake Lemoine joins Emily Chang to talk about some of the experiments he conducted that lead him to think that LaMDA was a sentient AI, and to explain why he is now on administrative leave. He's on "Bloomberg Technology." [#google](https://www.youtube.com/hashtag/google)[#bots](https://www.youtube.com/hashtag/bots)[#artificialintelligence](https://www.youtube.com/hashtag/artificialintelligence)[#technology](https://www.youtube.com/hashtag/technology) Read more here: [https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articl...](https://www.youtube.com/redirect?event=video_description&redir_token=QUFFLUhqbl9fcVdOdGU3MzVhcC1QMjBpMXpSaGdsZzFfQXxBQ3Jtc0trTGw2ZEdyN2wtalNpWkowZEdfcnp6eFltRmRoclVKQmZTTDZNQ0tqdVAzX29aRTJxSFZZbDhVLVhCazJNNFQxTnQtemF6aHQ2SDVlV09UN09fX19vZ09WWnUxVVhPS3ZPb0hFSEFUakRUbnZ2SFpzSQ&q=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bloomberg.com%2Fnews%2Farticles%2F2022-06-17%2Fcan-ai-gain-sentience-maybe-but-probably-not-yet-quicktake&v=kgCUn4fQTsc) -------- Like this video?
